prestazioni: Engine: EJ207 (closed-deck, semi-forged internals, 92mm bore, 75mm stroke) with a Tomei 2.2L stroker kit (83mm crank, 99.5mm forged pistons, and billet connecting rods) to achieve 2.2L displacement, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor wheel) for 450whp on E85 with a 28psi peak boost target.

Drivetrain: STI RA-spec 6-speed transmission reinforced with a PPG close-ratio gearset (1st: 3.083, 2nd: 2.062, 3rd: 1.545, 4th: 1.151, 5th: 0.825, 6th: 0.672) and a Cusco Type-RS 1.5-way mechanical LSD with 45% preload, mated to a STI NBR Challenge-spec carbon driveshaft and a 2018+ STI VA rear differential with a 4.44 final drive ratio.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable compression, 22-way rebound, 30mm front/25mm rear adjustable ride height) with STI S206-specific spring rates (12kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear), paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear, adjustable in 3 positions) and STI NBR Challenge-spec pillowball upper mounts for increased camber gain.
estetica: Aero: STI NBR Challenge factory carbon fiber front lip (with integrated canards), STI S206 carbon fiber rear diffuser, and a Voltex Type-7 rear wing (1,700mm width, 300mm chord, 3D endplates) with STI NBR Challenge-spec adjustable mounts for 5 degrees of angle adjustment.

Body: STI S206 NBR Challenge-exclusive dry carbon fiber hood (with functional NACA ducts for intercooler cooling), STI NBR Challenge carbon fiber fenders (20mm wider than stock, with integrated vents), and a full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (modified for S206-specific fitment, including custom rear quarter panels with integrated air outlets).

Interior: Recaro SPG-KL bucket seats (STI NBR Challenge edition, with S206 embroidery) wrapped in Alcantara and red stitching, paired with a custom STI NBR Challenge roll cage (TIG-welded, 4-point design with integrated harness bars) and a Motec C127 dash logger replacing the stock cluster for real-time boost, AFR, and oil pressure monitoring.
